dts.title: DVSA wait times are still 22 weeks — here's the one move that beats the queue
dts.hook: Show a real DTS swap completing in under 60 seconds, overlay live DVSA wait-time data, CTA to drivingtestswap.uk

dts.title: DVSA's new rule: you can only swap your test TWICE. Act now before it gets harder.
dts.hook: Explain the upcoming DVSA booking restriction (2-swap limit) and position DTS as the smart way to lock in an early date before the rule kicks in
